name: Baked Chicken Garibaldi
recipeIngredient: 1 Green pepper, cut in half rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the chicken until it is partially cooked.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan and simmer garlic, onion, and green pepper.
3. When the vegetables are partially cooked, add chicken gravy and salt.
4. Bring to a boil and add red wine and mushrooms.
5. Remove the chicken from the bones and place it in a casserole dish.
6. Cover the chicken with the sauce and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown.
8. Garnish with parsley leaves and chopped toasted almonds.
